---
name: Platform support
about: Report activation/install behavior on a specific AI tool
title: "[platform] "
labels: platform-support
---

**Tool & version**
e.g. Cursor 1.x / Windsurf / Copilot CLI / Codex / Gemini CLI

**Install method**
curl / Claude plugin / Cursor rule / Cursor plugin / Windsurf rule / Copilot prompt file / Codex symlink / Codex AGENTS.md / Gemini extension

**What works**
e.g. the skill activates on "improve this prompt", `/prompt-engineering` runs, etc.

**What doesn't**
e.g. no auto-activation, frontmatter not recognized, reference links not loaded.

**Suggested fix** (optional)
If you know the tool's native convention, share it.
